ghost predicate IsPermutation(p: seq<int>, n: int)
{
  n >= 1 &&
  |p| == n &&
  (forall i | 1 <= i <= n :: exists j | 0 <= j < n :: p[j] == i)
}

ghost predicate IsMerge(a: seq<int>, s1: seq<int>, s2: seq<int>)
  decreases |a|
{
  if |a| == 0 then
    |s1| == 0 && |s2| == 0
  else
    (|s1| > 0 && a[0] == s1[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1[1..], s2)) ||
    (|s2| > 0 && a[0] == s2[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1, s2[1..]))
}

// Lemma: if IsMerge(a, s1, s2), then IsMerge(a ++ [x], s1 ++ [x], s2)
lemma MergeAppendS1(a: seq<int>, s1: seq<int>, s2: seq<int>, x: int)
  requires IsMerge(a, s1, s2)
  ensures IsMerge(a + [x], s1 + [x], s2)
  decreases |a|
{
  if |a| > 0 {
    if |s1| > 0 && a[0] == s1[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1[1..], s2) {
      MergeAppendS1(a[1..], s1[1..], s2, x);
      assert (a + [x])[0] == a[0];
      assert (a + [x])[1..] == a[1..] + [x];
      assert (s1 + [x])[0] == s1[0];
      assert (s1 + [x])[1..] == s1[1..] + [x];
    } else {
      // From IsMerge unfolding: A || B, and !A, so B holds
      MergeAppendS1(a[1..], s1, s2[1..], x);
      assert (a + [x])[0] == a[0];
      assert (a + [x])[1..] == a[1..] + [x];
    }
  }
}

// Lemma: if IsMerge(a, s1, s2), then IsMerge(a ++ [x], s1, s2 ++ [x])
lemma MergeAppendS2(a: seq<int>, s1: seq<int>, s2: seq<int>, x: int)
  requires IsMerge(a, s1, s2)
  ensures IsMerge(a + [x], s1, s2 + [x])
  decreases |a|
{
  if |a| > 0 {
    if |s1| > 0 && a[0] == s1[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1[1..], s2) {
      MergeAppendS2(a[1..], s1[1..], s2, x);
      assert (a + [x])[0] == a[0];
      assert (a + [x])[1..] == a[1..] + [x];
    } else {
      MergeAppendS2(a[1..], s1, s2[1..], x);
      assert (a + [x])[0] == a[0];
      assert (a + [x])[1..] == a[1..] + [x];
      assert (s2 + [x])[0] == s2[0];
      assert (s2 + [x])[1..] == s2[1..] + [x];
    }
  }
}

ghost predicate IsMerge(a: seq<int>, s1: seq<int>, s2: seq<int>)
  decreases |a|
{
  if |a| == 0 then
    |s1| == 0 && |s2| == 0

// Lemma: if IsMerge(a, s1, s2), then IsMerge(a ++ [x], s1 ++ [x], s2)
lemma MergeAppendS1(a: seq<int>, s1: seq<int>, s2: seq<int>, x: int)
  requires IsMerge(a, s1, s2)
  ensures IsMerge(a + [x], s1 + [x], s2)
  decreases |a|
{
  if |a| > 0 {
    if |s1| > 0 && a[0] == s1[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1[1..], s2) {

}

ghost predicate IsPermutation(p: seq<int>, n: int)
{
  n >= 1 &&
  |p| == n &&
  (forall i | 1 <= i <= n :: exists j | 0 <= j < n :: p[j] == i)
}

ghost predicate IsMerge(a: seq<int>, s1: seq<int>, s2: seq<int>)
  decreases |a|
{
  if |a| == 0 then
    |s1| == 0 && |s2| == 0
  else
    (|s1| > 0 && a[0] == s1[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1[1..], s2)) ||
    (|s2| > 0 && a[0] == s2[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1, s2[1..]))
}

// Lemma: if IsMerge(a, s1, s2), then IsMerge(a ++ [x], s1 ++ [x], s2)
lemma MergeAppendS1(a: seq<int>, s1: seq<int>, s2: seq<int>, x: int)
  requires IsMerge(a, s1, s2)
  ensures IsMerge(a + [x], s1 + [x], s2)
  decreases |a|
{
  if |a| > 0 {
    if |s1| > 0 && a[0] == s1[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1[1..], s2) {
      MergeAppendS1(a[1..], s1[1..], s2, x);
      assert (a + [x])[0] == a[0];
      assert (a + [x])[1..] == a[1..] + [x];
      assert (s1 + [x])[0] == s1[0];

      assert (a + [x])[1..] == a[1..] + [x];
    }
  }
  // Ensure the postcondition holds
  assert IsMerge(a + [x], s1 + [x], s2);
}

// Lemma: if IsMerge(a, s1, s2), then IsMerge(a ++ [x], s1, s2 ++ [x])
lemma MergeAppendS2(a: seq<int>, s1: seq<int>, s2: seq<int>, x: int)

    }
  }
  // Ensure the postcondition holds
  assert IsMerge(a + [x], s1, s2 + [x]);
}

```dafny
ghost predicate IsPermutation(p: seq<int>, n: int)
{
  n >= 1 &&
  |p| == n &&
  (forall i | 1 <= i <= n :: exists j | 0 <= j < n :: p[j] == i)
}

ghost predicate IsMerge(a: seq<int>, s1: seq<int>, s2: seq<int>)
  decreases |a|
{
  if |a| == 0 then
    |s1| == 0 && |s2| == 0
  else
    (|s1| > 0 && a[0] == s1[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1[1..], s2)) ||
    (|s2| > 0 && a[0] == s2[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1, s2[1..]))
}

// Lemma: if IsMerge(a, s1, s2), then IsMerge(a ++ [x], s1 ++ [x], s2)
lemma MergeAppendS1(a: seq<int>, s1: seq<int>, s2: seq<int>, x: int)
  requires IsMerge(a, s1, s2)
  ensures IsMerge(a + [x], s1 + [x], s2)
  decreases |a|
{
  if |a| > 0 {
    if |s1| > 0 && a[0] == s1[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1[1..], s2) {
      MergeAppendS1(a[1..], s1[1..], s2, x);
      assert (a + [x])[0] == a[0];
      assert (a + [x])[1..] == a[1..] + [x];
      assert (s1 + [x])[0] == s1[0];
      assert (s1 + [x])[1..] == s1[1..] + [x];
    } else {
      // From IsMerge unfolding: A || B, and !A, so B holds
      MergeAppendS1(a[1..], s1, s2[1..], x);
      assert (a + [x])[0] == a[0];
      assert (a + [x])[1..] == a[1..] + [x];
    }
  }
  // Ensure the postcondition holds
  assert IsMerge(a + [x], s1 + [x], s2);
}

// Lemma: if IsMerge(a, s1, s2), then IsMerge(a ++ [x], s1, s2 ++ [x])
lemma MergeAppendS2(a: seq<int>, s1: seq<int>, s2: seq<int>, x: int)
  requires IsMerge(a, s1, s2)
  ensures IsMerge(a + [x], s1, s2 + [x])
  decreases |a|
{
  if |a| > 0 {
    if |s1| > 0 && a[0] == s1[0] && IsMerge(a[1..], s1[1..], s2) {
      MergeAppendS2(a[1..], s1[1..], s2, x);
      assert (a + [x])[0] == a[0];
      assert (a + [x])[1..] == a[1..] + [x];
    } else {
      MergeAppendS2(a[1..], s1, s2[1..], x);
      assert (a + [x])[0] == a[0];
      assert (a + [x])[1..] == a[1..] + [x];
      assert (s2 + [x])[0] == s2[0];
      assert (s2 + [x])[1..] == s2[1..] + [x];
    }
  }
  // Ensure the postcondition holds
  assert IsMerge(a + [x], s1, s2 + [x]);
}
